076ae9e6a5b2.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
076ae9e6a5b2.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
076ae9e6a5b2.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

3ca82cb75127.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
3ca82cb75127.description: At 3.9/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
3ca82cb75127.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

a0e7199579be.title: Build review volume — you lack statistical credibility
a0e7199579be.description: Only 8 Google reviews. A single bad review moves your average visibly. Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews.

b25313160e4b.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
b25313160e4b.description: Last inspected 2.1 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
b25313160e4b.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
b25313160e4b.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

d25b0393be44.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
d25b0393be44.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

71f710b5b073.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
71f710b5b073.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
71f710b5b073.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

d3696e3ee728.title: Ranked #7 of 8 locally — peers are ahead
d3696e3ee728.description: At percentile 14.3, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

9dbe4437349c.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
9dbe4437349c.description: You trail peers by 1.1 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
